_note: Metadata-only slice of the OpenTabs bitbucket plugin, vendored hermetically at SHA 4b17021637d2cac12b8d84d21c40e765aa7b85e9 (see vendor/opentabs-snapshot/PIN.md). Wall 1: NO dist/, NO handle() runtime is executed -- the importer (scripts/import-opentabs-catalog.mjs) reads ONLY .name/.description/.input/.group/.summary metadata. The opentabs.urlPatterns below is the AUTHORITATIVE upstream value (*://bitbucket.org/* -> service bitbucket.org -> derived stem 'bitbucket'; NOT in STEM_OVERRIDES because the host derives correctly). defineTool/OpenTabsPlugin and the api/apiVoid transport helpers are resolved from local stubs (sdk-stub.ts, bitbucket-api.ts) so the importer's import() never drags the real SDK's DOM/fetch surface into node.
name: @opentabs-dev/opentabs-plugin-bitbucket
